creator: silb@silb.no
text:
It looks like the article "contributing-ports" has been merged into the article "contributing" [1].

But the article "contributing-ports" is still listed at the website [2].

Should "contributing-ports" be removed from [3]?

[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/doc?view=revision&revision=46482
[2] https://www.freebsd.org/docs/books.html
[3] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/doc/head/en_US.ISO8859-1/htdocs/docs/books.xml
